title: Melted Arabian Lamb Roast
description: A tender halal lamb roast infused with green curry paste and a cooling mint yogurt sauce, perfect for monsoon evenings.
instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C and line a roasting pan with foil.
Rub the lamb roast with olive oil, salt, cumin, coriander, turmeric, and garlic.
Place the roast in the pan and spread green curry paste over its surface, then drizzle with lemon juice.
Cover the pan with foil and roast for 60 minutes, then remove the foil and roast for an additional 30 minutes until caramelized.
Whisk yogurt with chopped mint and a pinch of salt to create a cooling sauce.
Allow the roast to rest for 15 minutes after removing from oven before slicing.
Serve the sliced lamb with the mint yogurt sauce drizzled on top and a side of rice or flatbread.
Garnish with extra mint leaves and a squeeze of fresh lemon for brightness.
